parameters.text:
=Triggering *{{ $json.command }}* for *{{ $json.pillar }}* ({{ $json.account }}){{ $json.variantIndex !== null ? ' — hook variant ' + $json.variantIndex : '' }}{{ $json.assetSource ? '\nAsset source: ' + $json.assetSource : '' }}

parameters.command: =cd "{{ $env.HERMES_ROOT }}/severus-social" && npx tsx pipeline/heartbeat.ts --on-demand --pillar={{ $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.pillar }} --account={{ $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.account }}{{ $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.variantIndex !== null ? ' --hook-variant=' + $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.variantIndex : '' }}{{ $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.hookOverride ? ' --hook-override="' + $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.hookOverride.replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"' : '' }}{{ $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.assetSource ? ' --asset-source=' + $('Parse /render or /assemble').first().json.assetSource : '' }}

parameters.text:
={{ $json.exitCode === 0 ? '✅ Render complete — check 🎨 Creative & Content for approval link.' : '❌ Render failed:
```
' + ($json.stderr || $json.stdout || 'no output').slice(0, 1500) + '
```' }}

=*Usage*

`/render <pillar> [hook="..."] [variant=N] [account=mikeb|severus] [source=seedance|user_upload|hybrid]`
`/assemble <pillar> [hook="..."] [variant=N] [account=mikeb|severus]`

*Pillars:* case-study · ga4-tip · ads-tip · process-breakdown · client-result

*Examples:*
`/render ga4-tip`
`/render ga4-tip variant=2 source=seedance`
`/render case-study hook="Most ad agencies sell you Google Ads"`
`/assemble process-breakdown` (uses your uploaded clips)
